summary: Verified two new sponsor CTAs and regression on Fork-Fate. Header 'Sponsor your spot' link opens the sponsor dialog with $29/mo form and subscribe button. After spinning with ZIP 10001, the result card renders the featured 'Own a spot like this?' CTA at the bottom (non-sponsored result) and clicking it opens the same sponsor dialog. Footer 'Become a sponsor' still opens the dialog. Per instructions, did NOT submit PayPal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Header sponsor link ([data-testid=header-sponsor-link]), featured CTA ([data-testid=featured-sponsor-cta]) and footer become-sponsor-button all correctly open [data-testid=sponsor-dialog]. Featured CTA renders only when result !card.sponsored — confirmed on ZIP 10001. Do NOT click Subscribe with PayPal (LIVE).
